values.content:
=Assess this new student's profile and initial quiz answers to determine their level:

Student Name: {{ $json.student_name }}
Background: {{ $json.background }}
Initial Quiz Answers: {{ $json.quiz_answers }}

Return JSON with:
- current_level (beginner/intermediate/advanced)
- recommended_modules (array of 3-5 module names)
- learning_style (visual/auditory/reading)
- estimated_completion_days (number)
- risk_factors (array of potential challenges)

Return only valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Welcome to the Course! Your Personalized Learning Path
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.student_name }},

Welcome! Based on your assessment, you are at the {{ $json.current_level }} level.

Your first module is: {{ $json.recommended_modules[0] }}

Please complete it and submit the quiz using the link below.

Best regards,
LMS Team

parameters.subject: =Let's Review! Additional Help for {{ $json.module_name }}
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.student_name }},

We noticed you scored {{ $json.score }} on the {{ $json.module_name }} quiz.

Don't worry! Here is some personalized feedback:
{{ $json.feedback }}

Areas to review: {{ $json.weak_areas.join(', ') }}

Please review the material and retake the quiz.

Best regards,
LMS Support Team

parameters.subject: =🎉 Congratulations! Course Certificate
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.student_name }},

Congratulations on passing the {{ $json.module_name }} module with a score of {{ $json.score }}!

Your digital certificate is attached.

Feedback: {{ $json.feedback }}

Keep up the great work!

Best regards,
LMS Team

values.content:
=Analyze this student data for a weekly LMS report:

{{ JSON.stringify($input.first().json) }}

Provide a JSON response with:
- total_active_students (number)
- completion_rate (percentage)
- at_risk_students (number)
- top_struggling_module (string)
- weekly_summary (2-3 sentences)
- recommended_actions (array of 3 items for admins)

Return only valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Weekly LMS Analytics Report - {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
